name: OpenRock S Open-Ear Air Condition Sport Earbuds
description: OpenRock S Open-Ear Air Conduction Sport Earbuds Earphones are the perfect solution for active music lovers who want to stay connected without losing comfort.

features.Key Features:: Open ear comfort design | TubeBass technology | Directional audio technology | Professional sports sound effects | Extreme 60 hours battery endurance | IPX5 water resistant | Intelligent touch control
features.What's in the box?: 1x Pair Openrock S | 1x Chargimg Case | 1x Charging Cable
